# Machine Time

> A philosophical nonfiction work in 119 self-contained blocks by Stevan Milentijevic, on temporality, acceleration, and the substrate conditions of post-institutional civilization. Each block can be read independently.

## Full text

- [Complete manuscript](https://machinetime.xyz/llms-full.txt): All 119 blocks concatenated as plain text

## Individual blocks

- [Raw block endpoints](https://machinetime.xyz/raw/1.txt): Format is /raw/{n}.txt where n is 1 through 119. Preferred for automated clients.

## Human-readable site

- [Index](https://machinetime.xyz/index/): Site navigation
- [Block pages](https://machinetime.xyz/block/1/): Format is /block/{n}/ for browser viewing

## Author

- [Substack: The Machine Time Ledger](https://machinetime.substack.com/): Essays extending the framework

## Notes

- Each block is self-contained and can be read independently
- /raw/{n}.txt endpoints provide maximum reliability for automated access
- The complete text at /llms-full.txt is the canonical machine-readable artifact
